Lord, I now dissolve all patterns of wounding children in my lineage. I comes against all hurting ways - the abortions, the miscarriages, unwanted pregnancies, unwelcome babies, and births conceived out of wedlock.

I renounce all patterns of not valuing life. I reject all habits of emotional and physical battering, abandonment, and abduction of children. I say “NO MORE” to all patterns of troubled births and abnormal pregnancies.

Lord, I ask your forgiveness for all the ways my forefathers have brought harm to children. I ask you, Lord Jesus, to personally intervene to heal the wounds and stop the perpetuation of the evil pattern.

Father, bring forth people in my bloodline who reverence and love their children and raise them in ways that honor you. Let the future children in my family know what it means to be deeply loved.
